title: salix × semilapponum
intro: Salix × semilapponum, also known as the Lapland willow, is a hybrid willow plant that is a cross between the Salix alba and Salix lapponum species. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Salix × semilapponum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, teas, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
